allow: PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($?\) {} else { Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\gh", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHubCLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Filter "gh.exe" -Recurse | Select-Object -First 3 FullName })

PowerShell($bin = "C:\\Users\\jvvvc\\bin"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $bin\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $bin -Force | Out-Null }; $zip = "$env:TEMP\\gh.zip"; $extract = "$env:TEMP\\gh_extract"; if \(Test-Path $extract\) { Remove-Item $extract -Recurse -Force }; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/cli/cli/releases/download/v2.92.0/gh_2.92.0_windows_amd64.zip" -OutFile $zip -UseBasicParsing; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $extract -Force; $exe = Get-ChildItem $extract -Recurse -Filter "gh.exe" | Select-Object -First 1; Copy-Item $exe.FullName -Destination "$bin\\gh.exe" -Force; "Installed gh.exe to $bin"; & "$bin\\gh.exe" --version)
